name: Garlicky Italian Bread

ingredients.item: a third of a gallon of whole

method: Heat the oven at 300 Fahrenheit (180 degrees Celsius). Grease
and line an 8" x 4" loaf pan with parchment paper.
In a large dish for mix, combine flour, baking powder, baking
soda, salt, and oregano. Whisk together the egg, olive oil, and
milk in a separate large mixing basin.
Combine the dry and wet ingredients, then fold in the garlic,
mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil until thoroughly mixed. The
Pour batter into loaf pan, top with Parmesan, and bake for 50 to
55 minutes, or until brown and toothpick inserted in center
Cool for 10 minutes in the pan before transferring to a cooling
